section_name: Exemption from equipment requirements for racing activity vehicles
text:
A racing activity vehicle is exempt from vehicle equipment requirements under ORS 815.040 (Standards for window and windshield material) , 815.075 (Selling vehicles or equipment that violates rules) , 815.250 (Operation without proper exhaust system) , 815.295 (Failure to have required pollution control equipment) and 815.310 (Proof of compliance with requirements) if all of the following apply:

(1) The vehicle is equipped with original manufacturer’s equipment and accessories or their equivalent; and

(2) The vehicle is maintained in safe operating condition. [2007 c.693 §3]

(Slow-Moving Vehicles)
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 815. Vehicle Equip. Generally
##### § 815.109 — Exemption from equipment requirements for racing activity vehicles

A racing activity vehicle is exempt from vehicle equipment requirements under ORS 815.040 (Standards for window and windshield material) , 815.075 (Selling vehicles or equipment that violates rules) , 815.250 (Operation without proper exhaust system) , 815.295 (Failure to have required pollution control equipment) and 815.310 (Proof of compliance with requirements) if all of the following apply:

(1) The vehicle is equipped with original manufacturer’s equipment and accessories or their equivalent; and

(2) The vehicle is maintained in safe operating condition. [2007 c.693 §3]

(Slow-Moving Vehicles)

The vehicle is equipped with original manufacturer’s equipment and accessories or their equivalent; and
The vehicle is maintained in safe operating condition. [2007 c.693 §3]
